title: added sk_graphics_set_open_type_svg_decoder_factory_to_default
body:
**Description of Change**
Added function to set a default open type svg decoder

**SkiaSharp Issue**

Related to [Issue 2939](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/issues/2939)

**API Changes**

Added: 
- `bool sk_graphics_set_open_type_svg_decoder_factory_to_default()`

**Behavioral Changes**

None.

**PR Checklist**

- [x] Rebased on top of `skiasharp` at time of PR
- [ ] Changes adhere to coding standard
- [ ] Updated documentation
